app.description: Send personalized emails to customers about their appointments — including confirmations, updates, and cancellations — so they stay informed every step of the way

templateId.label: Pending email template
templateId.description: Email template that will be used to send to customers when they requested an appointment and their appointment is pending

templateId.label: Confirmed email template
templateId.description: Email template that will be used to send to customers when their appointment was confirmed

templateId.label: Declined email template
templateId.description: Email template that will be used to send to customers when their appointment was declined

templateId.label: Rescheduled email template
templateId.description: Email template that will be used to send to customers when their appointment was rescheduled

templateId.label: Calendar event template
templateId.description: Content of the event, that your customers will see in their calendar

statusText.email_app_not_configured: Email sender default is not configured
statusText.error_sending_customer_email_notificatio: Error sending customer email notification for new appointment
Error sending customer email notification for status change
Error sending customer email notification for rescheduled appointment

summary.max: Event summary must be no more than 256 characters

subject.max: Email subject must be no more than 256 characters
